meta.titleDefault: ZatGo Innovation — Operations that move with your teams.
meta.description: Enterprise operations platform — field apps, back-office tools, and customer portals.

brand.name: ZatGo
brand.tagline: Operations that move with your teams.

home.supporting: Field apps, desktop tools, and portals — one platform for how your teams work.
home.productsTitle: Built for ops, shipped to every channel
home.productsDesc: Start with Project Tracker, then expand into van sales, delivery, warehouse, HR, CRM, and back office.
home.channelsTitle: Mobile, desktop, and web — same platform
home.channelsDesc: One product family across phones, desktops, and the browser — data stays in sync for every role.
home.channelMobileBody: Apps for field and offline-first work — Go Van, Delivery, Warehouse, and more.
home.channelDesktopBody: Tools for power users — Project Tracker Pro, ZatGo POS, Accounting, Fleet.
home.channelWebBody: Portals and dashboards for customers, vendors, admins, and executives.
home.resourcesDesc: Get the apps, then jump into documentation for guides and help.
home.resourceDocsDesc: Guides, help center, and product docs
home.storyTitle: Field to desk to portal — one continuous operation
home.storyDesc: Capture work where it happens, finish it where power users live, and share status with everyone who needs visibility.
home.storyFieldBody: Mobile apps collect visits, deliveries, stock moves, and time — even when connectivity drops.
home.storyDeskBody: Desktop tools handle dense planning, POS, accounting, and fleet work without slowing the floor.
home.storyPortalBody: Customers, vendors, and leaders see the same live picture through web portals and dashboards.
home.ctaBody: Tell us about your sites, roles, and channels — we will map products to a rollout plan.

productsPage.title: Products
productsPage.metaDescription: ZatGo product catalog — Project Tracker, Go Van, Delivery, warehouse, HR, CRM, POS, and more.
productsPage.heading: The ZatGo product catalog
productsPage.description: Apps for field, floor, and office — one platform your whole team can use.

downloadsPage.title: Downloads
downloadsPage.metaDescription: Download ZatGo mobile, desktop, and web apps.
downloadsPage.heading: Get the apps
downloadsPage.description: Open live web apps now. Mobile stores and desktop installers appear here as soon as release packages are published.
downloadsPage.mobileIntro: Mobile apps for iOS and Android — field and warehouse first.
downloadsPage.desktopIntro: Desktop installers for Windows and macOS power users. Set NEXT_PUBLIC_RELEASES_BASE_URL when binaries are published.
downloadsPage.webIntro: Browser apps and portals — open in a new tab when your environment is running.
downloadsPage.checksumNote: Installer checksums show sha256:pending until published packages ship. Web opens do not require checksums.
downloadsPage.requirementsIntro: Baseline device and browser guidance. Exact needs depend on the product package you deploy.

requirements.ios: iOS 16 or later. Camera and location permissions for field products.
requirements.android: Android 10 or later. Storage and location permissions for offline and visits.
requirements.windows: Windows 10/11 (64-bit). 4 GB RAM minimum, 8 GB recommended.
requirements.macos: macOS 13 or later. Apple Silicon and Intel builds when published.
requirements.linux: Ubuntu 22.04+ or equivalent. AppImage / deb when published.
requirements.web: Current Chrome, Edge, Firefox, or Safari. Stable broadband recommended.
requirements.docker: Docker Engine 24+. Suitable for self-hosted platform components when published.

docsPage.title: Documentation
docsPage.metaDescription: Marketing hub for ZatGo docs — guides, integrations, developers, and help.
docsPage.heading: Guides, integrations, and help
docsPage.description: Deep links open the dedicated docs site. Set NEXT_PUBLIC_DOCS_URL when that app is deployed.

tutorialsPage.title: Tutorials
tutorialsPage.metaDescription: ZatGo tutorial series for project managers, field teams, warehouse, admins, and developers.
tutorialsPage.heading: Learn by doing
tutorialsPage.description: Each series opens in the documentation site. Use these hubs to find the right path for your role.

updatesPage.title: Updates
updatesPage.metaDescription: ZatGo changelog and product release notes.
updatesPage.heading: Changelog
updatesPage.description: What we ship across the platform, clients, and this marketing site.

pricingPage.title: Pricing
pricingPage.metaDescription: ZatGo pricing — Starter, Business, Education, Government, and Enterprise.
pricingPage.heading: Plans that match your rollout
pricingPage.description: Plans for teams, campuses, and agencies. All pricing is quote-based — tell us about sites, roles, and channels.
pricingPage.comparisonIntro: High-level capability matrix — your quote may tailor modules and sites.
pricingPage.recommendedNote: Business covers multi-branch rollouts with field, desktop, and portals — the path most customers start on.
pricingPage.ctaBandBody: Share your sites and channels — we will map the right plan and products.

faq.question: Do you publish list prices?
faq.answer: Pricing is custom based on sites, modules, and channels. Use Contact to request a quote.

faq.question: What is included in Education?
faq.answer: Education covers academic and training use with campus-friendly licensing. Commercial resale is not included.

faq.question: How does Government differ from Enterprise?
faq.answer: Government adds procurement-friendly documentation, security review pathways, and public-sector support — features can match Enterprise when required.

faq.question: Can we mix field and desktop apps?
faq.answer: Yes. Most customers start with Project Tracker and add Go Van, Delivery, Warehouse, or desktop tools as needed.

contactPage.title: Contact
contactPage.metaDescription: Request a ZatGo demo or contact sales about products and rollout.
contactPage.heading: Request a demo
contactPage.description: Share your company, sites, and which products matter first. We will map channels and a rollout plan.
contactPage.bullet1: Product fit for field, desk, and portals
contactPage.name: Name
contactPage.toastDesc: We will follow up shortly with next steps.
contactPage.toastMailtoDesc: We could not reach the lead service — your message is ready in email.
contactPage.toastError: Something went wrong. Try again or email us directly.

errors.name: Please enter your name

errors.message: A short message helps us prepare

contactPage.addressFallback: Office address is shared during onboarding.

faq.question: Which channels does Project Tracker support?
faq.answer: Project Tracker is available on web, mobile, desktop. Availability by plan may vary — ask sales for your rollout.

faq.question: Is Project Tracker available offline?
faq.answer: Field-oriented channels for Project Tracker are designed for unreliable connectivity where relevant. Exact offline scope depends on the module and device.

faq.question: How do we get started?
faq.answer: Request a demo from the Contact page. We will map roles, sites, and the right product mix for your organization.

aboutPage.title: About
aboutPage.metaDescription: About ZatGo Innovation — operations software for modern teams.
aboutPage.heading: Operations software built with field teams in mind
aboutPage.intro: ZatGo Innovation builds mobile, desktop, and web products that help organizations run projects, sales, delivery, warehouse, and back-office work in one connected family of apps.
aboutPage.missionBody: Make day-to-day operations clear for every role — on the road, on the floor, and at the desk.
values: Products that respect offline and field reality

careersPage.title: Careers
careersPage.heading: Build products operators actually use
careersPage.description: We are a product company focused on operations software. Open roles are listed below — even if you do not see a perfect match, tell us what you want to work on.
careersPage.empty: No open roles right now — reach out anyway.

product-designer.title: Product Designer
product-designer.summary: Shape multi-channel product UX for field and office workflows.

mobile-engineer.title: Mobile Engineer
mobile-engineer.summary: Ship reliable mobile experiences for offline-first operations.

customer-success.title: Customer Success
customer-success.summary: Help customers roll out products across sites and roles.

partnersPage.title: Partners
partnersPage.metaDescription: Partner with ZatGo Innovation — resellers, implementers, and technology partners.
partnersPage.heading: Grow with ZatGo
partnersPage.description: We work with resellers, implementation partners, and technology allies who help customers adopt the platform.

reseller.name: Reseller
reseller.body: Introduce ZatGo products to your customers and earn recurring value.

implementation.name: Implementation
implementation.body: Configure rollouts, train teams, and support go-lives across sites.

technology.name: Technology
technology.body: Integrate complementary tools and share go-to-market motions.

sections.title: What we collect
sections.body: When you contact us through this website we collect the information you submit (such as name, email, company, and message). Site analytics may collect anonymous usage data if analytics are configured.

sections.title: How we use information
sections.body: We use contact details to respond to demo requests and inquiries. We do not sell personal information.

sections.title: Retention
sections.body: Inquiry records are kept only as long as needed to handle your request and related follow-up, unless a longer period is required by law.

sections.title: Contact
sections.body: For privacy questions, contact us through the Contact page on this site.

termsPage.title: Terms of Use
termsPage.metaDescription: ZatGo Innovation website terms of use.
termsPage.heading: Terms of Use

sections.title: Website content
sections.body: This marketing site describes ZatGo products for informational purposes. Features, availability, and pricing may change and are confirmed during sales conversations.

sections.title: Downloads and demos
sections.body: Download links and demo requests may be marked as coming soon until packages or environments are published. Access to production software is governed by a separate agreement.

sections.title: Acceptable use
sections.body: Do not misuse this website, attempt to disrupt services, or submit unlawful or abusive content through forms.

sections.title: Liability
sections.body: The site is provided as-is without warranties regarding completeness of marketing materials. Product warranties are defined in customer contracts.

productDetail.modulesHint: Core areas included with this product.
productDetail.screenshotNote: UI previews below show the product layout direction — replace with live screenshots when packs ship.

audienceByChannel.mobile: Field and floor teams who need fast capture, offline resilience, and clear next actions on the phone.
audienceByChannel.desktop: Power users who plan, reconcile, and run dense operational tools on the desk every day.
audienceByChannel.web: Customers, vendors, and leaders who need live status without installing another client.

productDetail.ctaStripTitle: Ready to see it in your operation?
productDetail.ctaStripBody: Request a demo or compare plans — we will map this product into your rollout.

caseStudiesPage.title: Case studies
caseStudiesPage.metaDescription: How teams use ZatGo across field, desk, and portal operations.
caseStudiesPage.heading: Operations that moved with their teams
caseStudiesPage.description: Short stories from distribution, projects, and multi-site ops — products named, outcomes measured in plain language.
caseStudiesPage.ctaBody: Tell us about your sites and roles — we will map products and a demo path.

regional-distribution.title: Regional distributor cuts visit paperwork
regional-distribution.summary: A multi-branch distributor moved van sales and deliveries onto mobile apps with live desk visibility.
regional-distribution.challenge: Reps carried paper orders; warehouse and finance reconciled days later, and branch managers lacked a live picture of routes.
regional-distribution.approach: Rolled out Go Van and Delivery for the field, with Project Tracker for internal ops projects and a customer portal for order status.
regional-distribution.outcome: Same-day order capture, fewer missed collections, and branch leads reviewing routes without chasing spreadsheets.

campus-projects.title: Campus facilities runs projects in one place
campus-projects.summary: A university facilities team unified capital projects, contractors, and time logs across web and mobile.
campus-projects.challenge: Projects lived in email and shared drives; contractors and staff used different tools, so status meetings became archaeology.
campus-projects.approach: Adopted Project Tracker on web, desktop, and mobile, with vendor portal access for key contractors.
campus-projects.outcome: Shared boards and time entries replaced status chase-downs; leadership sees portfolio progress in one view.

field-service-fleet.title: Service fleet syncs jobs and vehicles
field-service-fleet.summary: A regional service operator connected field jobs, proof of work, and fleet desks on one platform.
field-service-fleet.challenge: Dispatchers assigned jobs by phone; technicians uploaded photos later; fleet costs and job outcomes never met in one report.
field-service-fleet.approach: Field Service and Delivery for technicians, Fleet on the desk, and BI dashboards for weekly ops reviews.
field-service-fleet.outcome: Dispatchers see live job state; proof attaches to the job; fleet and service reviews share the same weekly numbers.

multi-site-ops.title: Multi-site retailer aligns floor and back office
multi-site-ops.summary: A growing retailer linked warehouse moves, POS, and HR time across sites with shared portals.
multi-site-ops.challenge: Each site ran its own spreadsheets; stock outs surprised the floor; payroll and store ops argued over hours and transfers.
multi-site-ops.approach: Warehouse and ZatGo POS for sites, HR for time, and admin console for role-based access across branches.
multi-site-ops.outcome: Transfers and sales land in one system; managers trust the same stock and hours view across locations.
